global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central focus on text and shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center of the ad, featuring a combination of a circle and a square in muted colors.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Secure & simple No hidden fees' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo 'CoinBridge' is positioned at the top, featuring a modern font in white against a dark background.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in bold, inviting white font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
